title: docs.manifest.json
description: Manifest contract for an Astro 5 + Starlight docs site scaffolded by the doc-site skill. Hand-authored static JSON Schema (Draft 2020-12) shipped verbatim into target repos. Encodes every rule from 00 §2.2. NOTE on slug-uniqueness (00 §2.2 rule 5 / 10 §4.3 caveat): JSON Schema cannot express 'unique slug property across array items' (uniqueItems compares whole items, not a single property), so slug-uniqueness is NOT enforced here — it is enforced by the symlinker and the drift guard at scaffold/check time. Item 011's schema-fixture test honors this by skipping the duplicate-slug reject case.

social.description: Starlight social links. Keys are Starlight social-icon names; values are URLs. URL shape is advisory only and not schema-validated (validators run ajv without ajv-formats).

pages.description: Ordered page entries; order is sidebar order. May be empty.

slug.description: Route slug, POSIX-style (e.g. 'guides/setup'). Must be unique across pages (enforced by the symlinker/drift-guard, not by this schema — see top-level description).

source.description: Where the page body comes from. Required unless unmanaged is true.

from.description: Repo-root-relative markdown path to symlink in. Required iff source is 'symlink'; forbidden otherwise.

unmanaged.description: Escape hatch. When true, source/from are optional and the generator does not wire the page.

allOf.description: Rule 1: source 'symlink' ⇒ from present and non-empty.
